# Mangesh Raut — Expanded site map for AI agents (llms-full.txt)
# Companion to https://mangeshraut.pro/llms.txt · Updated 2026-07-15

## Homepage sections (SPA anchors on /)

- #home — Hero, name, role, primary CTAs
- #about — Background, full story, education signals
- #experience — Work history timeline
- #projects — Project showcase and GitHub-linked work
- #engineering — Engineering proof / showcase (also covered on /systems)
- #blog — In-page field notes teaser (canonical index: /blog)
- #certifications — Credentials and badges
- #skills — Skills visualization
- #publications — Papers and write-ups
- #awards — Awards shelf
- #contact — Email, socials, scheduling
- #uses — Link-out to /uses colophon

## Case studies

- https://mangeshraut.pro/case-studies/portfolio
- https://mangeshraut.pro/case-studies/hindai

- https://mangeshraut.pro/case-studies/assistme-va
- https://mangeshraut.pro/case-studies/bug-tracker

## Field notes (blog)

Canonical index: https://mangeshraut.pro/blog

Articles (slugs under /blog/):

- wwdc-2026-apple-intelligence-siri-ai
- notebooklm-2026-ai-research-agent

## API surfaces (not for training scrapes)

- /api/* — chat, health, integrations, monitoring (robots Disallow: /api/)
- /build-config.json · /build-config.js — public build metadata only (no secrets)

## Design & product notes

- Liquid glass materials (clear / balanced / tinted) with solid-surface fallbacks
- Theme: light / dark / high contrast / reduced transparency / reduced motion
- Dual-host parity: Vercel primary, GitHub Pages mirror
- Offline: service worker file present; registration policy managed in bootstrap (unregister-safe for dual-host)

## Contact for corrections

If an agent finds outdated facts, prefer emailing mbr63@drexel.edu rather than inventing biography.
